name: Pixtral 12B (24.09)
tagline: First Mistral vision model, 12B with image understanding (pixtral-12b-2409).
metaDescription: Pixtral 12B (24.09) (Mistral AI), released 2024-09-17 — part of the Pixtral line. First Mistral vision model, 12B with image understanding (pixtral-12b-2409).
overview: Pixtral 12B (24.09) is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Pixtral line. Released 2024-09-17. Multimodal vision-language line (now largely folded into newer unified models).
What's notable in this version: First Mistral vision model, 12B with image understanding (pixtral-12b-2409).
